name: Tracy Newman, Team Inslee
subject: FWD: Did you see this message from the Governor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Deadline tonight -- can you help out? | [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd350/476371335/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema") Hi there, Tracy here -- I just wanted to make sure you saw the Governor's email about why progressive governors matter -- and why we need you to make sure we keep up the fight. But right now, with so much at stake, we're way behind our goal -- we can't let that continue. Our mid-month deadline hits in just a few hours, and we need to hit $10,000 before midnight to keep up this progressive leadership. [**Can you chip in $30 right now, or pledge $20 as a monthly recurring donation, to make sure we have what we need to keep fighting?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd350/476371335/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema") Thanks, Tracy Newman | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd350/476371335/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Tuesday, May 15, 2018
Subject: Governors can make or break progress
Friend,
**It matters who is governor!**
This month when Iowa's legislature passed the strictest abortion bill in the country, effectively outlawing abortions six weeks after conception, Gov. Kim Reynolds could have vetoed it. Instead, she championed that bill, leading one of the most serious attacks on women's most basic rights and freedoms our nation has ever seen.
When lawmakers in Kansas and Oklahoma passed a bill allowing adoption agencies to prevent LGBT families from taking in children, the governors could have stopped this outrageous discrimination. Instead, they used the power of this office to sign that discrimination into law. It's beyond offensive -- it's just plain backwards.
**With Republican governors signing backwards laws across America and Donald Trump threatening so much of what we value from the White House, it has never been more clear why it matters who serves as governor.**
[**I need you to stand with me, to show your support and fight for what we believe in. I need to know you're by my side. We're coming up to our mid-May deadline -- can you chip in to support all that we're fighting for?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd350/476371335/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd357/476371335/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd356/476371335/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=25")

| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd355/476371335/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=50")
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd354/476371335/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=100")
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd350/476371335/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema")**
Leading their states away from backwards legislation is one of the greatest responsibilities governors wield. Governors set the tone for the policies their state will pass -- which should be focused on the big issues facing our state and our nation, instead of unconstitutional political plays that limit a woman's right to her own reproductive freedom, or strip LGBTQ families of their opportunities.
A governor's role is even more important in 2020 as we head towards redistricting. As Republicans across the nation have attacked our democracy through gerrymandering, I must do everything I can to protect our process in Washington state and make sure the redistricting lines are drawn in a fair way! There is no doubt If we want to prevent disenfranchisement after the 2020 census, **we need to make sure we have a progressive governo** r.
The attacks on women in Iowa and LGBTQ families in Kansas and Oklahoma are tragic but important reminders -- we must keep working towards progress, and we need everyone on our team. [**Show you're part of our team standing for progressive governing -- chip in today before the May 16 deadline.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd350/476371335/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
[CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd796c2/2f5ea88d/71516fa3/2cbcd350/476371335/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mid-may-deadline?utm_source=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&refcode=ema_2018-05-16_mid-month-3-fwd&utm_campaign=mid-month-3-fwd&utm_medium=ema")
---
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

name: betofortexas.com
subject: The Senate just voted to protect Net Neutrality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
Friends,
We just got big, breaking news: the Senate voted to pass a bipartisan bill that would protect Net Neutrality. This is a huge win for defending the free and open internet for every single American.
****But what might not surprise you is that Ted Cruz voted against the bill after taking over $322,000 in contributions from the telecom industry.**** Ted Cruz sided with the interests and agenda of PACs and corporations over everyday Americans. That's why it's absolutely essential that we win this Senate seat in November.****
****[We need you to step up before the day is over. Rush a donation of $3 right now to Beto's campaign to take on Ted Cruz and help us send someone who will stand up FOR Texans -- and against corporate special interests -- to the Senate. ](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ee6/3b1d797/63f1b541/35a8691e/1055038697/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180516-nn?refcode=ema180516&amount=3")****
If we allow Ted Cruz and the telecom industry to end our efforts to save Net Neutrality, it will open the floodgates for internet service providers to charge pay-for-play prices for millions of Americans to use the internet.
Since Beto launched his campaign for Senate, he's been listening to Texans in communities across the state, from rural farms to major urban centers. Beto has seen that access to high-speed Internet is a non-partisan issue that matters to every single one of us. It means finding a job, taking classes online, paying bills, and producing art. That's why he supports Net Neutrality, and he will continue to work across the aisle in Congress on legislation that will promote open and equal access to the internet.
****Today 's vote in the Senate was a big win for protecting Net Neutrality. But we can't let Cruz off the hook for his vote. Not only do we need to hold him accountable, but we need to replace him come November. ****
****[Beto is fighting to be a voice for all Texans -- no PACs or special interests served in his campaign. Can you chip in $3 today and support our people-powered campaign for Senate?](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ee6/3b1d797/63f1b541/35a8691e/1055038697/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180516-nn?refcode=ema180516&amount=3")****
Ted Cruz won't listen to the majority of Americans and support Net Neutrality. That means it's on all of us to deliver someone to the Senate who will.
Thanks for joining us,
Team Beto
****[DONATE $3](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ee6/3b1d797/63f1b541/35a8691e/1055038697/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bo-180516-nn?refcode=ema180516&amount=3")****

* * *
Paid for by Beto for Texas
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ee6/3b1d797/63f1b541/35a8691f/1055038697/VEsC/ "http://action.betofortexas.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you need to update your contact information, [ you can do so here.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ee6/3b1d797/63f1b541/35a86910/1055038697/VEsD/ "https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/s/update-your-information") [Click here to unsubscribe.](https://secure.betofortexas.com/page/m/6eb92ee6/3b1d797/63f1b541/35a86911/1055038697/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://secure.betofortexas.com/page/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

subject: Vote on Sherrod's new logo!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:

| | Team Sherrod is at a stalemate Peter. We're trying to decide on Sherrod's new logo for our campaign. The only thing is, the votes are literally tied in our office. name: Chris McDaniel
subject: Washington’s laziest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
Wouldn’t it be nice to work three days a week, never on the weekends, and have the entire month of August off? Because that’s exactly what our U.S. Senators do. That’s why I applaud the 16 Senators who have signed a letter asking to cancel their August recess so they can continue to do the work they were elected to do. Peter, Wouldn’t it be nice to work three days a week, never on the weekends, and have the entire month of August off? Because that’s exactly what our U.S. Senators do. That’s why I applaud the 16 Senators who have signed a letter asking to cancel their August recess so they can continue to do the work they were elected to do. As your Senator, I’ll always finish my work. But the Washington establishment is fine with taking a vacation for all of August --- even if important bills are left unattended. This is Washington at its laziest. Help me drain the swamp of establishment politicians by chipping in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 right now. name: Dave Leroy
subject: With Many Thanks!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leroy For Idaho; Richard A Howard, Treasurer
body:
---

| | Dear Supporters, Friends and Family: The path to Congress does not proceed from a second place finish..... Despite besting all other contenders, former Gubernatorial candidate Russ Fulcher beat me handily to win the nomination. I congratulated him in person last night. The impact of six weeks of constant commercial television and radio advertising against us funded by an out of state super pac was simply too much to overcome. I am not a Hillary Clinton. Had we made strategic mistakes or candidate gaffes, I would promptly own up. The opposite is the case. Our campaign was widely hailed by the public, media pundits and even by our opponents as the hardest working, best executed, most innovative and content-driven of any of the efforts. Lincoln Smyser, campaign manager, Jordan Watters, field director, and Pryce Robinson, all around ace and our cadre of wonderful volunteers were superb in designing and executing our plans. Roy Eiguren and Patricia Kempthorne gave us remarkably sage advice from the top. Rick Howard was and is the best-ever treasurer, tightly controlling and faithfully reporting the nearly $400,000 we will have raised and spent. Even I received regular accolades such as “best debate performance”, longest hours,most articulate expression on issues. And even better, Nancy Leroy, was and is my heroine as total team superstar, speaking, shaking hands, going door to door, phone calling for hours, and even doing a concession radio interview last night! I love that girl! My kids and hers, donated, advised, introduced us to donors and sent warmly appreciated support from long distance. My granddaughter, Lorelai, made the greatest “Hope you win, Gramps” poster ever conceived. Collectively, that is a well-done campaign. So thank you all. It was a great race, for a noble cause, at an important time. Together we have all stepped up and for that collegiality and unity of purpose, I am most honored and grateful. Please do stay aware of and involved in our national politics with so many significant issues needing so much attention. Let me know when you are ready to enter the public arena or find a great and worthy purpose and I will be there for you!! \- "Citizen" Dave |
---|---|---

name: The White House
subject: The community movement against ‘sanctuary’ laws
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df2b98b46c724e90c9ef98df67e081f08d249a65b6c6f847aca271f7e624dad216f11f9c6063ca6d985491db9b41220225eecf12365bf9da) The White House • May 17, 2018
## The Day Ahead
President Donald J. Trump will meet with Secretary General of the North Atlantic Treaty Organization (NATO) Jens Stoltenberg at the White House.
## The community movement against ‘sanctuary’ laws
**Sanctuary jurisdictions hinder Federal immigration enforcement**. These jurisdictions often refuse even basic requests for information, such as notification to Federal officials before the release of dangerous criminals from custody. The consequences of such actions can be fatal. **California has passed statewide sanctuary policies** that restrict cooperation between Federal immigration authorities and local law enforcement. Now, communities across the state have started coming out in opposition to the new laws. Many of these local leaders cite fidelity to the U.S. Constitution over California state law. **Yesterday, President Trump met with local officials** who spoke first-hand about how these sanctuary policies jeopardize the safety of their communities. "Our people are the ones hurting," San Jacinto Mayor Crystal Ruiz said. “All of us need help getting this solved.” [What you need to know about the movement against “sanctuary” policies](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df2b98b46c724e902fa5eee716b37062f348bff108931150a151125647646631bee41732daa3e07dc7ad0b52fab5940c9bcac9bfb6340be0) **Watch** : [President Trump’s full meeting with California community leaders](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df2b98b46c724e90090878895476cea050a2fa686d6df5854352015a39422911b7b6c7625da9fab7513346e12059c4b22093496c30bbbcbf) |
---
|

## America, Uzbekistan, and a new era of partnership
**President Trump hosted President Shavkat Mirziyoyev of Uzbekistan yesterday** , marking President Mirziyoyev’s historic first visit to the White House. The bilateral meeting ushers in a new era of strategic partnership between the two countries.
**America has an important partnership with Uzbekistan in fighting terrorism**. In the aftermath of the September 11 attacks on the United States, Uzbekistan provided crucial access and support to drive al Qaeda terrorists from Afghanistan. President Mirziyoyev reaffirmed his full support for President Trump’s South Asia strategy yesterday, including the effort to bring stability to Afghanistan.
**The two leaders also committed to exploring deeper economic ties**. President Mirziyoyev pledged to open Uzbek markets for American companies and investors by introducing international standards of transparency. During the visit, Uzbekistan signed more than 20 major business deals with U.S. companies.
[Watch President Trump welcome President Mirziyoyev to the White House.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df2b98b46c724e902c3e7452b2b6949c0637bbd610e858b9f0c6962bdf542a1d0e74a2be50fc409ff5234ad19c72db26a823ea6c7137de02)
**Learn more** : [A new era of strategic partnership between the U.S. and Uzbekistan ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df2b98b46c724e90510b0beaf195221898fd94e08c48ed54c7dad260ecbc9a55f77657e65e5b76494d43ca718c14c9965b1d9db15db35c76)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**President Donald J. Trump participates in a California Sanctuary State roundtable** | May 16, 2018

subject: thank you! now, to the summit

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-aL3FTicpLrzCvqwuyGslgAUeBD5EBY9GENwL8-JmEA=/D3B2j3iAACQX2JMX16fi0wzA767E5uq2tZ_OhmgxIOY=?recurring=auto&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180517_JM_basecamp6_all_logo)

Team, I just wanted to write to say--wow.

Kim showed me the list of everyone who stepped up to be a Base Camp Donor this week--a week which took a big turn as our campaign began to face relentless petty political attacks.

**There are days when campaigning feels much like climbing a mountain --there are days when we stand on a glorious summit, and days when it feels like an uphill slog through the rain. Yesterday felt like a slog--but seeing so many names on our Base Camp team from all over our district was overwhelming and uplifting. Together, we can withstand anything.**

But running for office isn't nearly as hard as finishing your homework when you don't have rural broadband, getting treatment when you have been stripped of your healthcare, or putting food on the table when your business went under during the government shutdown. These are the wrongs we are fighting so hard to right.

Together we will prove that stepping up to run for office is an exercise in strengthening and building community, not divisive tactics. Uplifting the political culture, so petty deceptions are no longer the norm.

I'm so grateful for this team. You always, always have my back when it counts most, and I plan to honor that.

**We have nineteen days to go.** Every day, I'll be working my hardest for you. Thanks for standing with our campaign in the final stretch--and helping us reach the real summit: a victorious campaign that proves that honesty and integrity always win the day.

Now let's keep climbing!

Jessica

name: Xochitl Hinojosa
subject: LONG READ: Diversity at the DNC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, www
body:
As Democrats, we value inclusion not simply because a diverse coalition is a strong coalition, but because we know that in order to expand opportunities for all Americans, all Americans must have a se
---
Representation matters, Derek.

As Democrats, we value inclusion not simply because a diverse coalition is a strong coalition, but because we know that in order to expand opportunities for all Americans, all Americans must have a seat at the table. That's why we're building a team that knows what it takes to win in every community -- and **the report below is a transparent examination of the DNC's efforts to build a party that truly reflects every single Democrat.**

In presenting this report, we aim to both hold ourselves accountable and provide a roadmap for our partners within the progressive movement.

### Leadership
Last year brought about an 80% increase in DNC officers of color. We now have a more diverse leadership pool than at any point in our party's history. We've more than doubled the number of African-American officers and increased the number of Latino officers.

Our senior leadership, which includes all department heads, also saw impressive diversity gains. We've seen a 67% increase in leaders of color and a 40% increase in women leaders. Women now make up two-thirds of directors at the DNC.

Last month, we invited prominent Black women leaders to come to our headquarters for a collaborative strategy session on our 2018 African American outreach and engagement efforts. This is part of our ongoing leadership strategy to be more inclusive and connected to community leaders and stakeholders.

### Staff
A major part of the new leadership's rebuilding process included increasing staffing levels from historic lows following the 2016 cycle in order to ramp up the organizing and mobilizing efforts that led to the past year's victories. As Tom Perez often notes, personnel is policy and reflects an organization's priorities. The urgent need to staff up at the DNC provided an immediate opportunity to put our commitment into action.

Under our new leadership, the DNC has increased:
* African-American staff by 36%
* Asian-American/Pacific Islander staff by 30%
* Latino staff by 340%
* LGBTQ staff by 28%

Overall, 44% of DNC staffers are people of color. 51% of DNC staff are women.

### Internships
We know that internships serve as the gateway into a career in politics. But the opportunity costs of unpaid internships are too burdensome for too many young people who are otherwise qualified -- and we know that this disproportionately affects young people of color, and other historically marginalized communities.

Tom Perez promised to end unpaid internships, and for the first time in DNC history, the spring 2018 class of interns received a stipend. We are excited by the increased diversity: Under the new policy 42% of our spring interns are people of color.

### Contractors
Like the staffing policy, we believe that the contracting and procurement process should create opportunities and be accessible and transparent, and our vendors should reflect the diversity of our country. Tom Perez followed through on his campaign commitments related to supplier diversity. All contracts and contractors will be reviewed before renewal -- there is no longer automatic renewal in practice or policy. The DNC has also eliminated many of the pre-existing contracts. We intentionally brought many services and talent in house to cut expenses as part of our rebuilding effort.

Our Chief Operating Officer, Laura Chambers, manages all diversity initiatives for the organization and has begun a new contract approval process that tracks all vendors receiving contracts of at least $5,000 in much greater detail -- by gender, racial, and ethnic diversity.

Now **outside consulting contracts only make up about 2% of the DNC's operating budget,** with 29% of that money spent on contracts going to women and minority-owned businesses. We have also put out a national call for diverse vendors to submit their qualifications and intend to share this database of vendors so it is a resource to state parties and our partners in the Democratic community.

### Moving forward
**Democrats believe that our leadership should always reflect the diversity of our party and our country. It is a political and moral imperative.** We simply cannot be effective advocates for the communities we represent if we do not accurately reflect them at every single level -- from staff, to party officers, to elected officials. Our work isn't complete, but we've made unprecedented progress. And we can say with confidence that we've spent this last year keeping our promise to build a Democratic Party that provides a voice for every single Democrat.

Thank you for your continued support,

Xochitl

Xochitl Hinojosa
Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. -- The key to our party's success in the years to come will be making investments in the women and people of color who form the backbone of our party. Democrats will win because our party accurately reflects the communities that we hope to represent.

name: Jason Yates
subject: Should the Senate Change the Rules?
body:
Peter,
There has been a lot of news lately about the GOP changing the Senate rules to speed up Trump’s nominations. I dug into this and learned that almost 300 hundred nominees for court seats and executive posts are stuck in a waiting pattern. The Senate has yet to approve them.
I also learned that it is taking an average of 84 days to confirm each nominee. That’s 55% longer than the four presidents who preceded President Trump.
Now, Republicans are thinking about a rule change to help the process along, complaining that Democrats are obstructing the process.
At the end of April, the Senate Rules Committee advanced a proposed change to the Senate Rules on required debate time for each nominee. The changes would cut the maximum debate time for non-cabinet executive branch nominees from 30 hours to eight hours and cut the time for district court nominees from 30 hours to two.
It’s not the first time the rules have been changed to fit the party in charge. In 2013, Senate Democrats temporarily shortened the debate time after complaining Republicans were employing obstruction tactics.
The current proposal must now pass the Senate with no support from Democrats. This means if Republicans hope to change the Senate rules and more quickly confirm these nominees, they would have to use what’s called the “Nuclear Option” where only 51 votes are needed to pass a rule change.
**Some suggest it is a dangerous pattern to change the rules to fit the objectives of the majority party. Others would argue that there is precedent for such changes and these changes will help get things done.**
So here’s the question!
[Peter, do you think the U.S. Senate should use the “Nuclear Option” to change the rules to speed up the confirmation process for President Trump’s nominees?](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fsenate-nuclear-option-for-judges-survey%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180517srv01&n=1)
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fsenate-nuclear-option-for-judges-survey%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180517srv01&n=2)
We are looking forward to hearing from you on this issue.
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180517srv01&n=3)

name: Debbie Wasserman Schultz
subject: Demand Congress protect Mueller (Signature needed)
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | **1OO,OOO Signatures Needed to PROTECT Robert Mueller
[ _ADD YOUR NAME >>_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fce/622b7b5b/1aa7a3b7/307b85fd/389452696/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/ja180517")** I think President Trump is nervous. Robert Mueller is the special counsel appointed to investigate the Trump campaign and administration's ties to Russia. Mueller's work must not be impeded. He's indicted several senior members of Trump's campaign. And we're not talking about volunteers who work in the mailroom -- **we're talking about Trump's former campaign manager.** Robert Mueller is doing his job thoroughly. Too thoroughly, it seems, for President Trump's comfort. He wants to fire Mueller -- presumably, before Mueller has the chance to complete his investigation. Now you know me. I'm not shy when it comes to calling out Trump and his allies in Congress on their missteps and failures. And a presidential candidate colluding with a foreign power trying to hack our elections is the height of misconduct. Mueller must be allowed to finish his work. Congress can protect Mueller by passing a law. But Trump-allied Republicans in Congress are blocking that action. [**_It's time for us to turn up the grassroots heat. We 're trying to collect 100,000 signatures demanding Congress protect Robert Mueller and his investigation. Will you be one of the 100,000? Add your name >>_**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fce/622b7b5b/1aa7a3b7/307b85fd/389452696/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/ja180517") We deserve to know what ties exist between our President and the foreign power that tried to hack our elections. Thanks for standing with me on this. Debbie

| | For Immediate Release: Thursday, May 17, 2018
Contact: [Emily Taylor-Johnson](mailto:emily@martharoby.com), 334.717.0461

Team Roby Releases Third TV Ad Focused on the Military

MONTGOMERY, AL -- U.S. Representative Martha Roby's (R-AL) campaign for reelection in Alabama's Second Congressional District today released its third TV ad ahead of the June 5th Republican Primary.

The ad highlights Representative Roby's work to deliver results on behalf of the people of Alabama's Second Congressional District, specifically as it relates to the district's strong military footprint. It features her successful efforts to [help bring the F-35 Joint Strike Fighter](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=96A117A9A3646) to the 187th Fighter Wing at Dannelly Field, ensure [Fort Rucker's aviation funding was not cut](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=96A117A9A3647) amid threats to do so under sequestration, and stop the Air Force from [moving the C-130 fleet](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=96A117A9A3648) from Maxwell-Gunter Air Force Base.

"From the River Region down to the Wiregrass, Alabama's Second District plays a huge role in keeping our nation safe," said Representative Roby. "It is my great honor and responsibility to fight for the men and women in uniform as well as the installations in Alabama that are critical to the United States military. I am proud of the results we've been able to deliver throughout my time in Congress, and I remain committed to continuing this work for the people I represent."

Watch and share Team Roby's third TV ad [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=96A117A9A3649).

We need 20,000 signatures in the next 48 hours to send our message. It's clear the Special Counsel's investigation into Russian meddling - and worse - in the 2016 election is reaching Trump's inner circle. Robert Mueller is not afraid to go after the truth, even if it leads to the Oval Office.

Cornered, the president will do anything to save his neck. But the American people deserve to know the truth about what the Russians did with our elections in 2016 - and how they did it.

And with a recent poll showing them close - just three points behind - well, the shenanigans are | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, we're asking for change - 10 cents to be exact! We knew it would happen eventually: Republicans are preparing to play dirty to defeat Tim in November. And with a recent poll showing them close -just three points behind \- well, the shenanigans are officially getting started. But here is some knowledge Republicans are apparently bankrupt on - Democrats give Tim Kaine lots of dimes! As someone who looks over the numbers constantly and sees all the small donations from grassroots supporters - I would know. So what do you say? Will you throw in some dimes to help us hit our goal, prove our opponents wrong, and fight back? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" "" Thanks! Jenny "" P.S. Now that the NRA has declared they are entering this race, and funding an opponent, we really do need to pinch together every last dime. "" \--- Jenny Nadicksbernd Finance Director Kaine for Virginia * | "" "" ""

name: Bryan Hood
subject: Reaching out from the Patrick Morrisey for Senate Campaign
body:
Dear Mr. Willis,

Thank you for your interest in helping out on the Patrick Morrisey for Senate campaign. Dedicated supporters are the backbone of our operation, and will go a long way towards ensuring that we defeat Joe Manchin in the fall.

I will be sure to let you know when a field office in your area opens up, in the meantime, feel free to reach out to Regina Narvaez, she works for the WV GOP in your area. She can be reached at 304-816-7268, or at [narvaezregina@gmail.com](mailto:narvaezregina@gmail.com).

Thank you,

Bryan Hood

\--

Bryan Hood

Morrisey for Senate, Inc.

Friend, did you get my note the other day?

I’m trying to reach as many conservatives as possible to make sure we’re all on the same page.

Politicians like Tammy Baldwin know how to manipulate voters. They know how to distort our vision. And they know how to win!

If we aren’t focusing all of our time defeating her, we might as well be handing her another victory.

Now, that is NOT what I want.

I’m hoping you’ll sign my petition to encourage all Republicans to come together now:** **** ****[https://leahvukmir.com/stand-with-leah/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=cca037f2b9ea4dc4904265c2633fc2e2&_e=UuCMubgKdzn5tf48fCqsF_G3KNunacVfPnUyynKXVwlLxUbUbzPpkGGOYbbPoT254IJSD3-ZsehKB--RB_RdmxqIcu2KaMKIUeOf7b931gIhNzEhuXcWMwzpQ8IBoTDxOVOEepr55VPuWokQIcbSvegmrK-fYpxRbBcoRcTkBoqryBTMQU_4kLiXzRt5hXcFX0Ykd_zntuOOv--G6JDjHYQ_f2582W_f0N0N6xdaccCD8SPe0H7Q6NmDwyz6EpXUSnBfRe1rpAtM36O5xoP8YRGCr2fWKfwX_-LFKoBbcilgThDEbCAx-ZIUtA-S7K0l4mjtfJX7X-XPR3m7PToHRyGauh63pfCEd1mxjTDLpg_9ndZLHRRbbfumBK_61LCQSeA81Cuw98LbIOITj2Y6TEj8a9AqTn9dBG-JzRr5CH0%3D)**

Friend, today marks a turning point in our campaign, the day we shift our eyes from the primary, and onto the general.

Together, we won the Republican endorsement for United States Senate at convention.

And we owe it all to the dedication and support of hundreds of grassroots supporters, like you.

So first, let me say, thank you.

Now, this victory is a cause for celebration, but times like these can create tension between other members of our party. And friend, that makes us ALL weaker.

Conservatives can’t expect to win in November if we can’t support each other now.

[**So today, I am calling for unity, and I am personally asking for you to join me with a gift of $25.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=cca037f2b9ea4dc4904265c2633fc2e2&_e=UuCMubgKdzn5tf48fCqsFz-M1O4kr0WXBqYrl5zBW1hSXER_BIn1gmUwGKbnYnNxBh9UV2Z25ASEYWx4Y6OFgmWTOA_twsRIFrCaMwLMJVu0aO93NUXReaPF5hrhGy85ejXXR8Nd2xmdlvryusyhPZxfuKxgPzgLOvbpKnOCBD6g5IQBeSfiWZkJULPudrw3YUQb6zmIyGis0g2oP6O_Sk0u8urxm9r8tYavMN7OjLKZUbW4HbVdQhYo541K6A4_22SxzJBG3mkTDxqIJzY91VUuI-FuU9QS3vaQZMVK4qIc0zsQT9RYlNnRnIhgyvk_9IhvvKqn9KpTYlZXooeDYvYwU626vRRW0bCHVqiXEC6lxLhd4KQZueN1xx88PIvUYe94LVLCIy0GhpvxJvodaIq43iVzj34M1OV07R8EUQUT1m2KTketeGhJ0wJTGw5z)

If Republicans are fighting with each other, rather than focusing on defeating Baldwin, our resources will be split, our message will be distorted, and friend, we might not be able to make it out of that mess.

If we want conservative victories and if we want to put America First and change Washington, we have to come together and defeat obstructionists like Tammy Baldwin.

That means unifying now.

It's airing across the district, and we've been getting a great response from voters. We hope you'll get to see it on air soon, if you haven't already.
On a related note, on the first anniversary of our incumbent's last public town hall meeting with constituents, Abigail announced that if elected, she will hold a [town hall meeting in each of our seven counties in the 7th District within the first year in Congress](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/KH7s1zpCBrMW7prM20C0n6-R24BGQn4Lpz8JBXS4I8A=). The voters of the 7th deserve a representative in Congress who will meet with their constituents and value their concerns, priorities, and questions.
With less than a month to go until the June 12 primary, please continue spreading the word about our campaign and encouraging your friends and neighbors to vote for Abigail! The enthusiasm of our supporters and the hard work of our team will get us through the primary and carry us onwards to the general election. With all of your support, we will flip the 7th in November!
**Volunteers** Currently, 1,206 people have registered to volunteer with our campaign, and they are a dedicated group from every single county in the 7th. They (you!) have been knocking doors and making phone calls, enabling direct contact with literally tens of thousands of voters. They are the backbone of our efforts, and we will win this race because of their (your!) hard work.

If you're interested in volunteering, [please check here for available days to volunteer](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/UX6uBVS0ZW0WvAV0wZmw9ShQMNZ7txiGWiV1rbQD8VA=). We host multiple phone banks each week, and eight door knocking shifts on the weekends. If you are unable to volunteer in person, you can sign up for a virtual phone bank and make calls from your own home, on your own schedule!
We need all hands on deck for the final four days leading up to the June 12th Democratic Primary. Please volunteer to help us, and bring your friends. If you are interested in signing up for the final stretch, [click here](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/UxNix6YZswMa8jVtUwE5sCgFFLRT7W6nuYHMlWT0tRo=). For any questions, please email our Field Director, Karen Mask, at [karen@abigailspanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/Z-5FimNO4o8-zR471R4iBQwQseshfO1nXjk9b_uQBAY=).
**Out & About** As of today, we've held 98 meet and greets across the district, and are on track to hold more than 100 by June 12th. Abigail loves these events because they give her the chance to talk directly with constituents. Our whole team enjoys them because the positivity and enthusiasm we see at these events encourage and inspire our efforts.

For information on our upcoming meet and greets and other events, please check [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/pmxZGgshWNXdYphImA0fnVo9lC1CGmfRtZPSNyqvh-Q=) (or see below for more info on campaign events). Feel free to invite your friends, and for more information, please contact Mary Jo at [MaryJo@abigailspanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/lTO4QZZ0sLNUCFlTfphYmTMKxnLH2BGS90r9k-JQhWI=).
If you have a college or high school student at home, please be sure to make them aware of this Friday's [Student Advisory Board](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/dD2-sUCipHwY9r3uEHGMmpQqevB_hp1HRDPKA5kSUx8=) event. **Fundraising** Our fundraising efforts continue to show the tremendous faith the community has in our campaign. Since the launch of our campaign last summer, we have been the only campaign to outraise Rep. Brat [three quarters in a row](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/Aa1u-qYoVo4cNlCfoVn6MAC3zml9pxTMr76lTIAF5dg=).
What's truly inspiring is the amount of support from right here in the 7th and across Virginia. Over 59% of donations are from voters within the 7th, and nearly 85% are from Virginians. Furthermore, two-thirds of contributions are $50 or less. **In the Media** New Campaign TV Ad ["Serve"](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/abWRQO_aiynaXRrdaKdmDW0K1Ub0SnFP2iLfwexHMbw=?v=m7Od5uKxVIc&feature=youtu.be)
WTVR Channel 6
[Meet the Candidates: Abigail Spanberger](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/czVfQm45VP04CV0LlxOgzeEzj9AATd1Vn77nP5ySan8=)
Glamour Magazine [Why These Two Former Female CIA Agents Are Running for Office](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/jCHC0fbqcQELpUIytPJiHTejitRrhMafCWFYuogQEY0=)
Richmond Times-Dispatch
[Abigail Spanberger's passion for languages led her to the CIA](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/p4c2ySb34b07jQxqvy4BQARTGmrFEcKXEuv4_jzDMmg=) CNN: [These former intel professionals are running for office to check Trump](https://act.myngp.com/el/IvSb9yLtZB20YXY2xcjVizkb2FgqIyK5pNKhOtMHLwU=/cH0u__LaT-t0lQZ67dngDm8mRXgzmKStRQyZS4KUvCE=)

| Friends,

We just received HUGE news. You've probably seen the media hyperventilating over our primary, calling it "contentious," saying our party is "fractured," and that we couldn't "come together." Well, we now have certifiable proof that they were WRONG!

Conservative outsider Mike Braun, someone who built his career in the private sector and is prepared to stand WITH President Trump and Vice President Pence, is BEATING Sleepin’ Democrat Joe Donnelly in the nation’s marquee U.S. Senate race.
---
| [SHARE THIS NEWS ON FACEBOOK](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=699d09be81&e=1acd9bb3d6 "SHARE THIS NEWS ON FACEBOOK")
---
| Just one week after our primary, Republicans have already come together (just as we said they would!) behind our incredible nominee. Mike Braun has spent his life creating Hoosier jobs, while Sleepin' Joe Donnelly hasn't even passed a single bill after serving in Congress for more than a decade!

The stakes are too high to look backward. We must move forward – and this poll proves we are!

Click here to see our Facebook post about this brand new poll. Share it with your friends. Make sure your friends and family are seeing that Democrat Donnelly isn’t just the most vulnerable Democrat in the United States Senate, but that he’s poised to go down in defeat this November.

-Kyle

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

body:
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b4/9e00690/47055dfe/24020684/1981904735/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-poll?gpsid=13_55_596&refcode=em18_180517_MayPol_fnd_gq_nono__TG&utm_campaign=em18_180517_MayPol_fnd_gq_nono__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=1")
Great news friends,

Polls are showing that with a little more than 100 days until Primary Day, Andrew Gillum is currently tied for second place -- and when voters learn about all the candidates for Governor, Andrew Gillum soars to a _double-digit lead_.

We've spent the last 14 months educating voters about Andrew's roots in the state and his background as the son of a construction worker and a bus driver -- and his bold, progressive agenda to invest more than $1 billion in our public schools and students, give teachers and support staff the raise they deserve, and make quality health care a constitutional right for all Floridians. And our work is paying off.

Andrew is poised to win this wide-open primary, but we need your help to keep up the momentum. We won't be able to match the resources of our three opponents -- but this polling proves that we don't have to -- as long as we communicate to primary voters, we will win.

**[Can you help us reach our mid-month goal of $5,675 by Saturday at midnight to stay on track this month? Chip in $5 or whatever you can afford.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb30b4/9e00690/47055dfe/24020687/1981904735/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-may-poll?gpsid=13_55_596&refcode=em18_180517_MayPol_fnd_gq_nono__TG&utm_campaign=em18_180517_MayPol_fnd_gq_nono__TG&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+help+us+reach+our+midmonth+goal+")**

Peter,

I'm just going to say it: Winning feels _good_.

This week, 15 EMILY's List candidates won their elections in Pennsylvania, Oregon, and Wisconsin!

And in less than three weeks, we have the chance to help even more women on the ballot on Super Tuesday.

If we want to keep this momentum going, we need everyone pitching in to make it happen. So I've gone through our records, and this is what I have on file for this email address:
**2018 Cycle Donor:** Not yet
**Suggested Action:** **[Donate $3 to our Super Tuesday Fund and help more pro-choice Democratic women win.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c5a8c/24c69fd9/1bfbc4fea/188f00cf/3606704967/VEsB/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180515_email_SuperTuesFund?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=7+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup9225+again+else&utm_campaign=WQEFEQ43N_digital_email_20180517_STFSuppRec_inact&source=WQEFEQ43N_digital_email_20180517_STFSuppRec_inact")**
Some of the highlights from Tuesday's wins include:

Two of our red-to-blue House candidates in Pennsylvania won their primaries. Helen Tai won her special election to flip a Pennsylvania state House district. And Ann Groves Lloyd in Wisconsin advanced to her special election on June 12th.

Those wins are awesome. And there's more where they came from.

On June 5th, 43 of our candidates are on the ballot in primary elections. Every single one of them is counting on our support just like our women on Tuesday did.

**Donate $3 to help reach our $100,000 Super Tuesday Fund goal and help pro-choice Democratic women keep winning:**

name: Ben Jealous
subject: For me, this is personal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
#
We can no longer afford to wait.

Friend,
I'm a candidate for governor, but I'm a parent first.
My two children attend public schools here in Maryland, and that's why I know there is no greater obligation than ensuring that every child has the resources they need to grow and thrive.
For generations, we've seen what investment in public education can do for our kids and communities -- but sadly, right now it just isn't a priority. For far too long, we've allowed ourselves to believe Maryland can't afford to fully fund our schools. But I know the opposite is true: We simply can no longer afford **not** to fully fund our schools.
**[That's why today I announced my plan to fully fund our public schools, provide access to universal pre-K, and finally provide fair pay for our educators -- if you're with me, add your name right now.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a613/7ab0e2c4/7fb1a065/349a4288/2258885270/VEsH/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/education-plan?source=OHQ05178A")**
This is personal for me: When my mother was 12 years old, she sued Baltimore's Western High School for Girls so she could desegregate it when she was 15. She was part of the wave of _Brown v. Board of Education_ litigants fighting for equal access to the classroom alongside legal giants like Thurgood Marshall. We've known since at least then that no theory of education really works unless we fully fund our schools.
Today is the 64th anniversary of that ruling -- the ruling that meant my mother, and girls and boys across the country, finally achieved equality with their classmates. We've come such a long way, but we have a long way still to go.
As governor, I'll finally set Maryland on a pathway where fully funding our schools becomes our state's top priority. Along the way, we'll ensure universal pre-K, expand community schools, and pay our educators more.
For me it's simple: When we invest in our kids' education, we're investing in the future of our state.
**[Let's be the generation that finally fully funds our schools -- add your name to stand with me and demand the best for Maryland's students, families, and teachers.](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a613/7ab0e2c4/7fb1a065/349a4288/2258885270/VEsE/ "http://act.benjealous.com/page/s/education-plan?source=OHQ05178A")**
Thanks,
Ben

Or we can [send in Mike Braun](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4a3f6cd934&e=1acd9bb3d6), the conservative outsider who's ready to shake things up in Washington. In the model of President Trump, Mike Braun built his career in the private sector, not politics. Tuesday's primary has got us fired up!

Many of our incredible supporters just like you showed up and voted for Sen. Bob Casey in the primary election, and now we can set our sights on the general in November. We're lucky to have such great members of Team Casey on our side, and we're just getting started.

Rep. Lou Barletta isn't going to sit back and relax after his win on Tuesday. Now that he's officially the Republican nominee for Pennsylvania's Senate seat, he'll work harder than ever to get to the Senate so he can be a rubber-stamp for every piece of the Trump administration's agenda.

**[We can't let that happen -- which is why we need resources to take on Barletta right now. Chip in $5 or whatever you can.](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e67ce/51dbcc2a/26730c/3a2bda9/3372615361/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/051718maymidmonth?gpsid=11_63_630&refcode=em18_180517_midmo1_fnd_gq_ndn__TC&utm_campaign=em18_180517_midmo1_fnd_gq_ndn__TC&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bcase&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&utm_content=2+-+We+cant+let+that+happen++which+is+why+we")**

name: Joe
subject: My vote on net neutrality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
It's simple: We need net neutrality to keep the internet open and free, and to prevent the biggest corporations from deciding whose voices are heard. Ending net neutrality would allow internet provide |
---

| | Dear Peter,

Yesterday I was proud to help pass a bill in the Senate that would restore net neutrality protections.

It's simple: We need net neutrality to keep the internet open and free, and to prevent the biggest corporations from deciding whose voices are heard. Ending net neutrality would allow internet providers to slow down or speed up content if it helps their bottom line. **That 's bad for Hoosiers, and I won't stand for it.**

It's wrong to force small businesses to pay more to have their products compete with those of larger corporations. It's wrong to force families to pay more for the same level of content. It's wrong to take away students' unfiltered access to the resources they need to succeed.

Now, the resolution we passed in the Senate will go to the House, where I hope the lawmakers there will follow in our bipartisan footsteps. If they don't take action, net neutrality will expire on June 11.

**Let 's stand together and make sure that doesn't happen.**

Thanks,
Joe
